title: 10 precautions to take when using Scutellaria lateriflora (Skullcap) for medicinal purposes
intro: When using Scutellaria lateriflora, also known as skullcap, for medicinal purposes, it is important to take certain precautions. First, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new herbal supplement, including skullcap, to ensure it is safe and appropriate for your individual health needs. Additionally, it is important to use skullcap that has been harvested and processed properly, as improper handling can result in the presence of harmful contaminants. It is also recommended to start with a low dose and gradually increase as needed, paying close attention to any potential side effects. Pregnant or breastfeeding women, as well as individuals with liver disease, should avoid using skullcap altogether. Lastly, it is crucial to only purchase skullcap from reputable sources to ensure you are getting a high-quality, safe product.
